texto: There's something very peaceful about being in love. It can make you light as a feather; so blissfully unaware of anything else of importance. It can make you feel anger, rage, jealousy and lust all in one sentence. But the most important thing that love can give a person is certainty. Certainty that love, real love, will always pull you through your darkest days.
explicacao: Citação de Shelly Pratt sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “There's something very peaceful about being in love. It can make you light as a feather; so bliss…” articula reflexao, true-love, certainty em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e reflexao.

texto: I feel like you're my destiny, you're my everything and I think I have to thank her for that. Don't ever leave me, okay? 'Cause if you do, I think you might just take a bit of my soul with you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Shelly Pratt: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I feel like you're my destiny, you're my everything and I think I have to thank her for that. Don…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, destiny, think pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
